title: sarcathria ambigua
intro: Sarcathria ambigua, also known as Yellow Mountain or Golden Ragwort, is a flowering plant species in the Asteraceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of East Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sarcathria ambigua include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, often used to make teas, capsules, or topical creams for various health applications.
